title: Supporting Data for Efficiency of Digital Photolithographic Synthesis of Large, High-Quality DNA Libraries and Microarrays using a Guanine O6 Dephosphitylation Strategy
author: Santhosh, Santra
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This dataset supports the manuscript "Efficiency of Digital Photolithographic Synthesis of Large, High-Quality DNA Libraries and Microarrays using a Guanine O6 Dephosphitylation Strategy." 
 This is an updated version of " 10.5281/zenodo.15404232". The current  version has updated details on "sequencing calculation" and have corrected the sequence direction in "Sequencing_Data_Analysis.xlsx" 
 It includes the following experiments to analyze the effect of position-dependent G-rich centres on the photolithographic synthesis of DNA microarray: 
 
 Hybridization Assay 
 qPCR 
 Sequencing 
 
 All the data is organized in subfolders, with individual ReadMe files explaining the experiment protocol and data. For sequencing analysis scripts, see:  10.5281/zenodo.15411466  
  Please cite this dataset using the Zenodo DOI below when referencing these results: 10.5281/zenodo.17048135.
